meta_title: NBR Hair Extensions in Fresno | Studio One
meta_description: High-end hand-tied hair extensions for unparalleled quality in the Central Valley
h1: High-end hand-tied hair extensions for unparalleled quality.
hero_subtitle: Elevate your look and ignite your confidence with the most natural looking hand-tied hair extensions in the Central Valley.

sections.heading: Why choose NBR at Studio One?
sections.body: Studio One specializes in Natural Beaded Row hand-tied hair extensions using ISLA Hair, available only to NBR Certified artists. Installation uses beaded rows with no heat, glue, or adhesives for minimal damage.

sections.heading: How to apply for NBR hair extensions with Studio One
sections.body:
STEP 1: Share your hair history with us via our online questionnaire.

STEP 2: Upload photos of your current hair and an inspo photo.

STEP 3: Schedule your phone consult and book your appointment.

sections.heading: Testimonials
sections.body:
Barbara G.: "I leave feeling confident and looking my best!" Cat is quite the artist. I trust her opinion on what will look best for me.

Sontoya R.: "She gave me the long luxurious hair that my genetics could not!" Before I got extensions from Cat, my hair was flat and fine. Now, my hair is what I always imagined.

sections.heading: NBR Packages
sections.body:
REVAMP - 3 Rows - every 6-8 weeks
18": $2880-$3760  |  22": $3600-$4600
Perfect for maximum thickness and length; ideal for naturally thick hair or short layers.

AMPLIFY - 2 Rows - every 6-8 weeks
18": $2160-$2880  |  22": $2700-$3600
Most popular choice; ideal for hair reaching collarbone with desired added length.

POLISH - 1 Row - every 6-8 weeks
18": $1440-$2000  |  22": $1800-$2500
Enhance volume and texture in existing natural or slightly longer hair.

sections.heading: Hair Extensions Payment Plans
sections.body: Payment plans available for all services through Cherry Payment.

sections.heading: Get ready to achieve stunning hair results and NO damage.

faq_items.q: What type of hair do you use for NBR Extensions?
faq_items.a: ISLA Hair is exclusively Remy 100% human hair, available only to NBR Certified artists. Hand-tied wefts cover more surface area for seamless, natural results.

faq_items.q: Do I have to come in for a consultation?
faq_items.a: No, consultations are conducted over the phone to discuss your current hair, history, and desired transformation.
Usually 6-8 weeks depending on hair density and growth cycle.
A typical reservation is 3-5 hours, depending on your customized hair transformation.

faq_items.q: Do you color my hair when I get my extensions?
faq_items.a: Yes, hair and extensions are colored at the same reservation for seamless blending.
Beaded rows distribute weight evenly with fewer contact points. No heat, glue, or adhesives used.

faq_items.q: How long do the extensions last?
faq_items.a: NBR hair extensions last from 6 months to 1 year.
Rows are the sections used to install the wefts.

faq_items.q: What do you mean by wefts?
faq_items.a: Wefts are strips of sewn hair extensions, typically 10-12 inches long, installed like a headband.

faq_items.q: Can I wear my hair in braids or half up?
faq_items.a: Yes. Seamless blend allows extensions to remain hidden when hair is split or styled up.

faq_items.q: Can I wear my extensions up?
faq_items.a: Yes, even immediately after your appointment. You can maintain an active lifestyle.

faq_items.q: Can I swim or work out with extensions?
faq_items.a: Yes. Extensions are lightweight; you should not need to modify your regular activities.
Absolutely. Payment plan options are available upon request during consultation.
